suggested_invariant.title: Column events.ip_address (ip) must have legal_basis + retention
suggested_invariant.statement: Column events.ip_address is classified as ip PII but is missing: legal_basis, retention. Per INV-INVENTORY-002, every PII-flagged column MUST declare both legal_basis and retention before release.
suggested_invariant.rationale: Unlabeled PII handling is a regulatory exposure (LGPD / GDPR / HIPAA / CCPA). INV-INVENTORY-002 makes this a hard-fail gate; this candidate names the exact column that needs curation.
